drl:
rule "R0"
when
    accumulate( T2(f1 not in (4.5, -1.0, 1.5)); $a0_0 : count() )
then
end
rule "R1"
when
    $p1_0 : T0(f1 in (3.5, 4.0))
then
    insert(new T1("zz", $p1_0.getF0(), "", false));
    insert(new T2($p1_0.getF0(), $p1_0.getF2()));
end
rule "R2"
when
    ( $p2_0 : T1(!(f0 contains "ab"), $b2_0_0 : f3) )
    or
    ( $p2_0 : T1(f0 matches "p+.t", $b2_0_0 : f3) )
then
    drools.setFocus("ga");
    insert(new T2(5.5, $p2_0.getF1()));
end
rule "R3"
agenda-group "ga"
when
    (or not T1() not T1())
then
    insert(new T2(4.0, 1.5));
end
rule "R4"
when
    $p4_0 : T1(f2 > "zz", f0 in ("beta", "beta", ""), f3 == false)
    $p4_1 : T1(f2 < "alpha")
then
    insert(new T2(4.0, $p4_1.getF1()));
    insert(new T2(3.5, 3.5));
    modify($p4_0) { setF3(true) }
end
